title: GNN Module Output Schema
description: Output schema for the DRIFT_DETECTED BUS event payload

shape_formed.description: True if the 3D shape was successfully constructed

shape_nodes.description: Deformed node positions after shape analysis

drift_detected.description: True if structural drift was detected

drift_location.description: Node ID where drift was detected, or null

drift_magnitude.description: Magnitude of detected drift (0–1), or null if no drift

root_cause.description: Entry-point node of the root cause chain, or null

root_cause_chain.description: Full root cause chain from origin to drift node

prediction.description: Human-readable failure prediction string, or null

cycles_to_failure.description: Estimated cycles until failure, or null

confidence.description: GNN's confidence in its drift analysis
